title: Bookstral - AI Storytelling Studio
author: Mohamed Yassine Hemissi
description: Bookstral is an AI storytelling studio that turns text into scene-based narratives with images and narrated audio, built for the Mistral Hackathon 2026.
content:
![Poster](https://portfoliomyh.b-cdn.net/bookstral/PROJECT.jpeg)

Bookstral is an AI-assisted storytelling studio that turns text into scene-based stories with images and narrated audio. It was developed for the Mistral Hackathon 2026.

## Highlights
- Story planning and scene generation from prompts or documents
- Image and audio generation per scene with voice selection
- Studio dashboard for editing and production
- Player experience for finished stories
- Marketplace publish, unpublish, and buy flows

## Technologies
- Next.js (App Router), React, TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS and shadcn/ui
- LangChain and LangGraph for AI workflows
- ElevenLabs for voice synthesis
- libSQL for persistence
- NextAuth for authentication
- UploadThing for file uploads
